articles.title: Liberals suspend federal fuel excise taxes until Labour Day
articles.description: The Liberal government will suspend the fuel excise tax on gasoline and diesel until Labour Day as the Iran war sends energy costs surging, Prime Minster Mark Carney announced Tuesday.
